# liter-llm CLI Reference

Use this skill when invoking, documenting, or changing the liter-llm command-line interface.

- `liter-llm`: LiterLLM proxy server and MCP tool server
- `liter-llm api`: Start the OpenAI-compatible proxy server.
- `liter-llm mcp`: Start the MCP server exposing LLM operations as tools.
